query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `jobs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `externalId` varchar(255),
  `title` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `company` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `location` text,
  `description` text,
  `descriptionHtml` text,
  `applyUrl` text,
  `source` varchar(128),
  `matchScore` float DEFAULT 0,
  `status` enum('ingested','matched','to_apply','applied','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ingested',
  `isDuplicate` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `hasEmail` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `emailFound` varchar(320),
  `tags` json,
  `rawJson` json,
  `ingestedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `appliedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `jobs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
)
command:

  `appliedAt` timestamp NULL,

  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `jobs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
)
